lead.description: Organizations and individuals who need world-class training come to Management Consulted. ✔ Consulting candidates work with us to navigate the case interview and land offers at 170+ global consulting firms. ✔ Universities engage with us to give their students a leg up in the consulting recruiting process, as well as to give them best-in-class training on Excel & PowerPoint. ✔ Companies engage with us to increase the communication, presentation, and persuasion abilities of their teams through dynamic, bespoke workshops.
